pageContext.name: There Were Dragons
pageContext.description: While other places have ponies or parrots … we have dragons.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the There Were Dragons Fine Art Print, a breathtaking piece of original How to Train Your Dragon artwork by artist George Caltsoudas.  This is Berk. Join Hiccup Horrendous Haddock III and his fellow Vikings as they take to the skies on their dragons. Once a plague on the humble island village, these ferocious beasts have become steadfast friends to the young heroes willing to make peace with their enemies. Hiccup and Toothless lead the charge for change while twins Ruffnut and Tuffnut ride their Hideous Zippleback, Snotlout manages his Monstrous Nightmare, and Astrid soars with her Deadly Nadder. A classic Celtic knotwork-inspired border frames the illustration, although it cannot contain the speed and span of the Night Fury's adventurous wings.  Each There Were Dragons Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available unframed and in a custom framed presentation, this fantasy artwork is a must-have for fans of the How to Train Your Dragon series.  Bring your collection to new heights on the back of the There Were Dragons Fine Art Print by George Caltsoudas today!
